message:
test(e2e): add dedicated stats subcommand e2e tests (beads_rust-fakg)

7 tests covering stats JSON output structure:
- empty workspace (zeroed counters)
- populated workspace (3 issues, correct totals)
- after close (closed_issues increments, open decrements)
- dependency-blocked issues
- breakdown presence
- plain text output
- --no-activity flag suppresses recent_activity

Also adds #[must_use] to hex_encode (clippy pedantic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
